title: Elon Musk drifted from Larry Page over a decade ago, but their companies are closer than ever
summary_full: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.
summary_public: SpaceX and Google have a long and complicated relationship, but they were both celebrating this week after Elon Musk's company held its blockbuster IPO.
